description_long: This is a large, armored combat tactical vehicle with an angular, faceted body and a dark green exterior. It features a prominent wire-frame structure on the roof, likely for radio or communication purposes, and is equipped with six large, rugged tires suitable for off-road or urban terrain. The front of the vehicle has a reinforced bumper and a sloped, armored grille, while the sides display hatches and small vision ports. The rear is boxy and appears to have additional armor plating, with no visible windows. The vehicle's overall design emphasizes protection, mobility, and utility in potentially hostile environments.
description: A dark green, heavily armored combat tactical vehicle with six rugged tires and a wire-frame roof structure, designed for protection and mobility.
description_view_0: Front view shows the reinforced bumper, sloped armored grille, and the wire-frame roof structure.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the six large tires, angular body, and the full length of the wire-frame roof structure.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the boxy armored back, lack of windows, and the continuation of the roof structure.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the tires, angular armor, and side hatches.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with thick, angular steel armor plating; sloped surfaces for deflection; no modular or reactive panels visible.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Solid dark green color; no visible camouflage pattern.
attribute_tire_type: Six large off-road tires with deep tread pattern; appear reinforced for heavy-duty use.
